api_discovery.solution: LTX v2 supports duration parameter: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20 seconds

fixes_applied: Using duration parameter instead of num_frames
Margaret visible in shots 2-3 (hands visible, figure at altar)
Full extended incantation: 9 parts spanning all shots
Each shot has specific incantation_segment and incantation_level
Shot 7 explicitly matches master frame lighting
Shot 8: Margaret continues OVER child crying
Shot 9: Margaret SHOUTS final words OVER child scream - simultaneous climax
issues_from_v6_review: Shot 06 generated as 6-panel grid instead of single frame
Shot 08 has cult members in background - Margaret should be ALONE
Baby visible in background somewhere - NOT in script
Character consistency - Margaret face varies between shots
Chamber architecture varies between interior shots

human_refinement_feedback_v7: INTRO WAS AMAZING - keep shot 01 approach
Shot 02 zooming out TOO FAST - slow down camera motion
ALL interior shots need IDENTICAL color/texture/lighting
Shot 08 cult members - either match everything or REMOVE THEM
Margaret and child voices SIMULTANEOUS - not Margaret lip-syncing child lines
BABY IN BACKGROUND - remove, not in script
Shot 09 empty room makes NO SENSE - candles should blow out but STILL BE VISIBLE
Better VOCAL SIGNATURE descriptions needed for dialog
Apply all metalearning to FULL EPISODE profile
critical_fixes_v7: Add negative prompts: 'no other people, no cult members, no babies, no grid, no collage, Margaret ALONE'
Slow camera motion in shot 02: 'very slow crane, glacial pace'
Force lighting consistency: 'tungsten candlelight 2700K, deep amber shadows, identical to shot 02'
Shot 09 fix: 'candles extinguished but still present, smoke wisps, chamber STILL VISIBLE'
Dialog tone markers: 'ancient resonant whisper', 'terrified child whimper', 'commanding ritual shout'
Simultaneous audio: 'Margaret's voice AND child scream LAYERED, both audible, not sequential'

quantum_integration.purpose: Enhance motion variety while maintaining consistency

key_learnings: Always check API schema for correct parameters (duration vs num_frames)
Continuous audio requires explicit threading through every shot prompt
Character visibility must be consistent - no sudden appearance/disappearance
Dialog overlap requires both voices mentioned in same prompt as LAYERED/SIMULTANEOUS
Master frame lighting must be explicitly matched in derivative shots
Negative prompts essential: 'no other people, no grid, no collage, ALONE'
Camera motion speed must be explicit: 'very slow', 'glacial', 'deliberate'
Interior consistency: reference exact color temperature and lighting setup
After-climax shots: objects remain visible even if effect ends
Vocal signatures help LTX generate better implied audio: 'ancient whisper', 'terrified whimper'
Human review catches issues AI analysis misses

director_profile_learnings.camera_motion: ALWAYS glacial/very slow unless action beat
director_profile_learnings.lighting_reference: Lock to master frame, specify color temp (2700K tungsten)
director_profile_learnings.character_isolation: ALWAYS specify 'ALONE, no other people' unless script says otherwise
director_profile_learnings.audio_layering: SIMULTANEOUS/LAYERED not sequential for overlapping voices
director_profile_learnings.negative_prompts: Standard: 'no grid, no collage, no babies, no cult members unless specified'
director_profile_learnings.post_climax: Objects remain visible, just affected (candles out but present)
